brain_consensus.headline: Quiet Accumulation Beneath the Panic

next_move.reasoning: Despite the 79.4% match to bottom_2024_aug Disbelief, current score sits in Anxiety (39-46) not Disbelief (55-62), and massive divergences in ETF flows (+45), VIX (+26), and funding (+17) versus that bottom suggest this is not a true bottom analog but rather a mid-cycle chop zone where momentum has already recovered too far to be disbelief; with 0% direction accuracy and repeated UP calls failing into HOLD, the honest read is we stay stuck in Anxiety chop until either fear_greed drops toward true capitulation or funding/VIX normalize.
